## Tesla Delivery Beat Sustains AI-Driven Valuation Debate

A delivery beat without an AI monetization proof point continues to leave TSLA's valuation multiple contested — for a tech PM, the critical question is whether FSD/AV progress (not volume) is what eventually re-rates the stock, and this headline does not resolve that.

- Tesla reported a delivery beat versus expectations — no specific volume figure is stated in available headlines.
- The beat keeps the AI/autonomous valuation premium thesis in play rather than resolving it.
- Headline frames TSLA valuation as debate-in-progress, not settled — bullish and skeptical views co-exist.
- Autonomous/FSD positioning appears central to how analysts are contextualizing the delivery result.
